name: Protected B boundary enforcement
description: All AI processing must occur in Canadian Azure regions for Protected B data

name: RAG-first: grounded responses required for workspace chat
description: Workspace chat mode must produce grounded responses with minimum citation ratio

name: Bilingual capability required
description: All workspace tools must declare bilingual support or route through translation

name: Low confidence requires disclosure
description: Responses with confidence below 0.4 must include explicit uncertainty disclosure

name: Tool must be registered with classification ceiling
description: Every tool invoked must have a declared classification ceiling in the tool registry

name: Data residency enforcement
description: Tool data residency must be Canada Central or Canada East

name: Audit trail completeness
description: Every agent step must have correlation_id and trace_id
